{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "General manager",
  "description": "W.Else Nigeria Limited is a commited to provided great food delivery experience across Nigeria. W.Else Nigeria Limited has been delivering greay meals across Portharcourt through its brands wherelse.ng, soupplace.ng and Gogrills.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Revenue growth and sales targets
	Customer satisfaction ratings
	Staff performance and retention
	Food cost control and waste reduction
	Operational efficiency
	Compliance with health and safety standards.


Requirements
Educational Qualification:


	Minimum of BSc in: Hospitality Management, Business Administration, Hotel &amp; Catering Management, Marketing or related fields
	(Relevant work experience may substitute for formal education.


Relevant experience:


	Restaurant or hospitality management
	Team supervision and staff coordination
	Customer service management
	Inventory and stock control
	Sales and performance monitoring
	Financial reporting and budgeting.


Professional Skills &amp; Competencies:
Core Skills:


	Strong leadership and team management skills
	Excellent verbal and written communication
	Customer service excellence
	Problem-solving and decision-making ability
	Inventory and cost control management
	Basic accounting and financial reporting knowledge
	Proficiency in MS Word, Excel, and POS systems.


Operational &amp; Technical Skills:


	Restaurant operations management
	Staff scheduling and workforce planning
	Food safety and hygiene compliance
	Sales tracking and performance analysis
	Vendor and supplier coordination
	Conflict resolution and complaint handling.


Personal Attributes:


	Result-oriented and performance-driven
	Strong leadership presence
	Organized and detail-oriented
	Ability to work under pressure
	High level of integrity and professionalism
	Energetic and proactive
	Excellent interpersonal skills.


Other Requirements:


	Willingness to work flexible hours (including weekends and holidays)
	Ability to manage both front-of-house and back-of-house operations
	Strong presentation and reporting skills
	Ability to motivate and develop staff
	Good understanding of customer satisfaction strategies.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to:&nbsp;Wherelseng@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

General manager Job at W.Else Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        W.Else Nigeria Limited is a commited to provided great food delivery experience across Nigeria. W.Else Nigeria Limited has been delivering greay meals across Portharcourt through its brands wherelse.ng, soupplace.ng and Gogrills.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General manager
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Revenue growth and sales targets
	Customer satisfaction ratings
	Staff performance and retention
	Food cost control and waste reduction
	Operational efficiency
	Compliance with health and safety standards.


Requirements
Educational Qualification:


	Minimum of BSc in: Hospitality Management, Business Administration, Hotel & Catering Management, Marketing or related fields
	(Relevant work experience may substitute for formal education.


Relevant experience:


	Restaurant or hospitality management
	Team supervision and staff coordination
	Customer service management
	Inventory and stock control
	Sales and performance monitoring
	Financial reporting and budgeting.


Professional Skills & Competencies:
Core Skills:


	Strong leadership and team management skills
	Excellent verbal and written communication
	Customer service excellence
	Problem-solving and decision-making ability
	Inventory and cost control management
	Basic accounting and financial reporting knowledge
	Proficiency in MS Word, Excel, and POS systems.


Operational & Technical Skills:


	Restaurant operations management
	Staff scheduling and workforce planning
	Food safety and hygiene compliance
	Sales tracking and performance analysis
	Vendor and supplier coordination
	Conflict resolution and complaint handling.


Personal Attributes:


	Result-oriented and performance-driven
	Strong leadership presence
	Organized and detail-oriented
	Ability to work under pressure
	High level of integrity and professionalism
	Energetic and proactive
	Excellent interpersonal skills.


Other Requirements:


	Willingness to work flexible hours (including weekends and holidays)
	Ability to manage both front-of-house and back-of-house operations
	Strong presentation and reporting skills
	Ability to motivate and develop staff
	Good understanding of customer satisfaction strategies.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: Wherelseng@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Chartered Accountant",
  "description": "1159 Realty is a leading real estate business focused on young investors. We have a mission to bridge the gap between the capital intensiveness of the real estate industry and young investors who have been sidelined due to a lack of capital.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chartered&nbsp;Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Ilorin, Kwara&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time
Company: Reputable Real Estate Firm

Description


	We are seeking a highly competent and detail-oriented Chartered Accountant to join our growing real estate company.
	The ideal candidate must be financially disciplined, analytical, and experienced in managing corporate accounts with integrity and precision.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily accounting operations and financial reporting
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements
	Manage payroll, tax filings, VAT, PAYE, and statutory remittances
	Monitor cash flow, budgeting, and financial forecasting
	Reconcile bank statements and manage company accounts
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations and internal controls
	Provide strategic financial advice to management
	Supervise accounting staff (if applicable).


Requirements


	Must be a Chartered Accountant (ICAN/ACCA certified)
	3 - 5 years of accounting experience (real estate experience is an added advantage)
	Strong knowledge of financial regulations and tax laws
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	High level of integrity and confidentiality
	Strong analytical and organizational skills.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary
	Growth opportunities
	Professional work environment
	Opportunity to be part of a forward-thinking real estate brand.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;1159realtyhr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Chartered Accountant Job at 1159 Realty




        
    

        
        1159 Realty is a leading real estate business focused on young investors. We have a mission to bridge the gap between the capital intensiveness of the real estate industry and young investors who have been sidelined due to a lack of capital.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chartered Accountant

Job Location: Ilorin, Kwara 
Employment Type: Full-time
Company: Reputable Real Estate Firm

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly competent and detail-oriented Chartered Accountant to join our growing real estate company.
	The ideal candidate must be financially disciplined, analytical, and experienced in managing corporate accounts with integrity and precision.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily accounting operations and financial reporting
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements
	Manage payroll, tax filings, VAT, PAYE, and statutory remittances
	Monitor cash flow, budgeting, and financial forecasting
	Reconcile bank statements and manage company accounts
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations and internal controls
	Provide strategic financial advice to management
	Supervise accounting staff (if applicable).


Requirements


	Must be a Chartered Accountant (ICAN/ACCA certified)
	3 - 5 years of accounting experience (real estate experience is an added advantage)
	Strong knowledge of financial regulations and tax laws
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	High level of integrity and confidentiality
	Strong analytical and organizational skills.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary
	Growth opportunities
	Professional work environment
	Opportunity to be part of a forward-thinking real estate brand.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: 1159realtyhr@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Service Delivery Officer",
  "description": "Cobranet Limited is&nbsp;a reputable organization incorporated in 2003 and provides internet solutions. Our footprint and range of products have grown immensely since incorporation and we are proud to provide every segment of society with a reliable link to the digital universe.

Our entire network topology is rugged, dynamic and fully redundant with negligible downtimes: content showing extremely high availability exceeding 99.5%. Our promise is to continue providing innovative solutions at the best feature-to-price and service-to-price ratio.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Service Delivery Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for an experienced and well-organized Service Delivery Supervisor to provide the necessary support to the field sales team.
	The successful candidate will become the point of reference for colleagues and customers alike, by keeping schedules and providing feedback, documentation and information.
	The goal is to facilitate the team&rsquo;s activities so as to maximize their performance and the solid and long-lasting development of the company.


Responsibilities


	Supervise and coordinate the Service Delivery Team by managing and monitoring. Schedules, supervising and filing important documents and communicating relevant information.
	Ensure the adequacy of sales-related equipment or material.
	Handle, manage and respond to complaints from the sales team and give out solutions when needed to avoid delays.
	Store and sort financial and non-financial data in electronic form and present reports.
	Prepare, fill and send daily Service Delivery Sheet.
	Monitor and make sure all accounts are not disconnected, where applicable.
	Monitor and Handle the processing of all orders with accuracy and timeliness.
	Monitor the team, to make sure information of unforeseen delays or problems are addressed and notified to the sales person and clients.
	Monitor the team&rsquo;s progress, identify shortcomings and propose improvements.
	Generate daily, weekly and monthly reports and analysis of the service delivery team.


&nbsp;Requirements


	Minimum of BSc/HND in Computer Science or any related field
	Great educational background, preferably in the fields of computer science or engineering for technical project managers.
	Proven working experience as a project administrator in the information technology sector.
	Should have some technical background, with understanding or hands-on experience on internet service delivery.
	Excellent internal communication skills.
	Solid organizational skills including attention to detail and multi-tasking skills.
	Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Office experience as a sales coordinator /service delivery coordinator or in other administrative positions will be considered a plus
	Proficiency in English.
	Well-organized and responsible with an aptitude in problem-solving.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	A team player with high level of dedication.
	Should be able to handle and supervise large projects for installations.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@cobranet.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Service Delivery Officer Job at Cobranet Limited




        
    

        
        Cobranet Limited is a reputable organization incorporated in 2003 and provides internet solutions. Our footprint and range of products have grown immensely since incorporation and we are proud to provide every segment of society with a reliable link to the digital universe.

Our entire network topology is rugged, dynamic and fully redundant with negligible downtimes: content showing extremely high availability exceeding 99.5%. Our promise is to continue providing innovative solutions at the best feature-to-price and service-to-price ratio.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Service Delivery Officer
Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Description


	We are looking for an experienced and well-organized Service Delivery Supervisor to provide the necessary support to the field sales team.
	The successful candidate will become the point of reference for colleagues and customers alike, by keeping schedules and providing feedback, documentation and information.
	The goal is to facilitate the team’s activities so as to maximize their performance and the solid and long-lasting development of the company.


Responsibilities


	Supervise and coordinate the Service Delivery Team by managing and monitoring. Schedules, supervising and filing important documents and communicating relevant information.
	Ensure the adequacy of sales-related equipment or material.
	Handle, manage and respond to complaints from the sales team and give out solutions when needed to avoid delays.
	Store and sort financial and non-financial data in electronic form and present reports.
	Prepare, fill and send daily Service Delivery Sheet.
	Monitor and make sure all accounts are not disconnected, where applicable.
	Monitor and Handle the processing of all orders with accuracy and timeliness.
	Monitor the team, to make sure information of unforeseen delays or problems are addressed and notified to the sales person and clients.
	Monitor the team’s progress, identify shortcomings and propose improvements.
	Generate daily, weekly and monthly reports and analysis of the service delivery team.


 Requirements


	Minimum of BSc/HND in Computer Science or any related field
	Great educational background, preferably in the fields of computer science or engineering for technical project managers.
	Proven working experience as a project administrator in the information technology sector.
	Should have some technical background, with understanding or hands-on experience on internet service delivery.
	Excellent internal communication skills.
	Solid organizational skills including attention to detail and multi-tasking skills.
	Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Office experience as a sales coordinator /service delivery coordinator or in other administrative positions will be considered a plus
	Proficiency in English.
	Well-organized and responsible with an aptitude in problem-solving.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	A team player with high level of dedication.
	Should be able to handle and supervise large projects for installations.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@cobranet.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only qualified candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Secom Limited was established as a financial services company. It began as a financial service company with steadfast commitment to exceptional customer service, and overtime, has grown into a leading professional Company in Nigerian. Secom is a diverse and innovative company able to handle large scale transactions and also manage such operations seamlessly.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Yaba,&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Administrative Assistant will support daily office operations by ensuring a well-organized, functional, and professional work environment.
	The role involves coordinating with vendors, managing office equipment, handling records and documentation, and supporting general administrative tasks.
	This position is ideal for a young, energetic male candidate who resides close to Sabo, Yaba.


Key Responsibilities


	Liaise with vendors and service providers for office-related needs.
	Coordinate repairs and maintenance for office equipment such as laptops, printers, and other devices by contacting repair technicians when issues arise.
	Ensure a pleasant office ambiance, keeping the workspace orderly and fresh (this role is not a cleaning position).
	Check and promptly report electrical faults and facility-related issues.
	Organize, file, and maintain office documents and records.
	Assist with printing, photocopying, and scanning of documents.
	Handle the dispatch and delivery of letters and documents.
	Support general administrative and clerical duties as assigned.


Requirements


	NCE or School Leaving Certificate.
	Male candidate preferred.
	Young, energetic, and willing to learn.
	Proximity to Sabo, Yaba is required.
	Basic knowledge of office equipment and administrative tasks.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Responsible, neat, and well-organized.


Salary
N80,000 &ndash; N100,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV&nbsp;to:&nbsp;secomltd1@gmail.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Administrative Assistant&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.",

Administrative Assistant Job at Secom Limited




        
    

        
        Secom Limited was established as a financial services company. It began as a financial service company with steadfast commitment to exceptional customer service, and overtime, has grown into a leading professional Company in Nigerian. Secom is a diverse and innovative company able to handle large scale transactions and also manage such operations seamlessly.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Assistant

Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Administrative Assistant will support daily office operations by ensuring a well-organized, functional, and professional work environment.
	The role involves coordinating with vendors, managing office equipment, handling records and documentation, and supporting general administrative tasks.
	This position is ideal for a young, energetic male candidate who resides close to Sabo, Yaba.


Key Responsibilities


	Liaise with vendors and service providers for office-related needs.
	Coordinate repairs and maintenance for office equipment such as laptops, printers, and other devices by contacting repair technicians when issues arise.
	Ensure a pleasant office ambiance, keeping the workspace orderly and fresh (this role is not a cleaning position).
	Check and promptly report electrical faults and facility-related issues.
	Organize, file, and maintain office documents and records.
	Assist with printing, photocopying, and scanning of documents.
	Handle the dispatch and delivery of letters and documents.
	Support general administrative and clerical duties as assigned.


Requirements


	NCE or School Leaving Certificate.
	Male candidate preferred.
	Young, energetic, and willing to learn.
	Proximity to Sabo, Yaba is required.
	Basic knowledge of office equipment and administrative tasks.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Responsible, neat, and well-organized.


Salary
N80,000 – N100,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: secomltd1@gmail.com using “Administrative Assistant” as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
